title: Portion
description: A container for the modifier groups that can be applied to a portion of a menu item.

name.description: A descriptive name for this portion, for example, "1st Half" or "2nd Half".

guid.description: A unique identifier for this portion, assigned by the Toast POS system.

modifierGroupReferences.description: An array of `referenceId`s for `ModifierGroup` objects. These objects define the modifier groups that can be applied to this portion.

priceScaleFactor.description: A multiplier that adjusts the cost of modifiers in this portion.
